item.title:
Pinnacle: Pinnacle @Pinnacle · 17min If you want to bet the @hornets -6 tonight, best to do it with us at -101.
Trading at -110
item.description:
Pinnacle @Pinnacle · 17min If you want to bet the @hornets -6 tonight, best to do it with us at -101.
Trading at -110 or higher everywhere else.
Moving to 6.5 in spots, too.
No se pudo reproducir el contenido multimedia. Recargar 237

item.title: Schultz_Report: Jordan Schultz @Schultz_Report · 19min Source: Michigan State S Malik Spencer concluded a 30-visit with the #Patriots.
item.description:
Jordan Schultz @Schultz_Report · 19min Source: Michigan State S Malik Spencer concluded a 30-visit with the #Patriots.
A projected Day 3 pick, Spencer — a three-year starter — had 52 tackles, 5 PBUs and 2 sacks last season for the Spartans. 7 25 136 13 mil
